chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No. D- 1219 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For Directions. For hearing of CMA 5143/2024 (C/A) 29.05.2025. Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahesar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for SALU Khairpur. Mr. Zulifqar Ali Naich, AAG along with Prof. Dr. Yousif Khushk Vice Chancellor, Dr. Zulifqar ali Shaikh Registrar and Dr. Naveed Ahmed Shaikh DEAN, Pakistan Study Social Science, Shah Abdul Lateef University, Khairpur. ****************** On 08.05.2025 alleged contemnors were directed to be present in person so that charge would be framed against them for contempt proceedings. Today Dr. Yousif Khuskh Vice Chancellor Shah Abdul Lateef University Khairpur in compliance of order dated 08.05.2025 has furnished explanation and apology, same is accepted. He has also filed statement along with advertisement published in daily newspaper JANG dated 18.05.2025 in compliance of order dated 07.11.2023. After going through the same counsel for applicant does not press listed CMA 5143/2024, the same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PS
